response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified song title 'id:entity voices' from the concert theme 'CHROMATIC FUTURE' and confirmed with search results. 2. Performed search using 'id:entity voices Hololive Indonesia lyrics' to get official lyrics. 3. Mapped the concert performance scene from 01:53 to the end. 4. Compiled metadata and lyrics for JSON output.
response.global_summary: The video features promotional segments followed by live concert footage of the Hololive Indonesia members performing their original song "id:entity voices" during their 'CHROMATIC FUTURE' 5th-anniversary concert.

scenes.description: The intro shows various Hololive Indonesia members in a city setting, leading into the 'CHROMATIC FUTURE' concert where they perform 'id:entity voices' on stage.
scenes.performer_in_video: Hololive Indonesia (Moona Hoshinova, Kureiji Ollie, Vestia Zeta, Pavolia Reine, Anya Melfissa, Airani Iofifteen, Kaela Kovalskia, Kobo Kanaeru, Ayunda Risu)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
君に届けたい id:entity
立っていたのは、眩しいスポットライトの中
"おはよう! こんばんは!"
また会えるよね、きっと
手を伸ばせば、もっと届く距離
蹴り上げてくnight, 試したい
穏やかに、恋したい
どんなシーンも、私に魅せて
瞳を閉じたら、止めどない id:entity
触れた意味を。
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hear out my voice, id:entity
Standing in the middle of the bright spotlight
"Good morning! Good evening!"
We'll meet again, surely.
Let's keep going until we reach the distance
Kicking the night, I want to try.
I want to fall in love peacefully
Whatever scene you show me
Even if I close my eyes, I won't let you go.
